tests.result: Component schedule is explicit, but unresolved physical/contract ownership prevents independent proof of every overlap control.
Material risk remains wherever gross acreage or project economics cannot be traced to one share.
Modeled reserves exist, but enforceable remaining-capital and financing terms are incomplete.
Low/base/high dispersion remains sensitive to duration, unit values, and realization discounts.
Residual risk remains and must not be converted into an approved recommendation.

residual_risks: No tract/county inventory reconciles total NRA to producing, visible undeveloped, and dormant buckets.
No complete public royalty-versus-operated-water volume, margin, and capital bridge exists.
Bolt and desalination lack the complete enforceable milestone, ownership, and remaining-capital record needed for decision-grade option values.
strongest_failure_path: Oil and gas activity slows while produced-water growth normalizes; the market multiple compresses, service growth absorbs more capital than expected, and uncontracted infrastructure options fail to produce customer cash.
